title: Smoke-Hot Norwegian Creamy Stew
description: A comforting, creamy stew originating from Norway, featuring smoky flavors and gluten-free friendly ingredients, served in banana leaves.

ingredients.name: Gluten-free Flour
ingredients.notes: Make sure to use a high-quality gluten-free flour.

ingredients.name: Dill
ingredients.notes: Fresh or dried dill works well.

ingredients.name: Banana Leaves
ingredients.notes: Fresh banana leaves are essential for this recipe.

ingredients.name: Smoked Paprika
ingredients.notes: This adds a smoky depth to the stew.

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of butter in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the garlic and cook until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add the smoked salmon and cook until opaque, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the gluten-free flour and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Gradually add the heavy cream, whisking continuously to avoid lumps.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 5-7 minutes, or until thickened.
Stir in the smoked paprika, dill, lemon juice, onion salt, and black pepper.
Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
Spoon the stew into banana leaves and serve immediately.
